mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_mapping_room ( rule_no, shelf_id, region_id, region_name, floor_id, floor_name, room_id, room_name, rack_name, tags, source_row_hash ) VALUES ( #{ruleNo}, #{shelfId}, #{regionId}, #{regionName}, #{floorId}, #{floorName}, #{roomId}, #{roomName}, #{rackName}, #{tags}, #{sourceRowHash} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE rule_no = VALUES(rule_no), shelf_id = VALUES(shelf_id), region_id = VALUES(region_id), region_name = VALUES(region_name), floor_id = VALUES(floor_id), floor_name = VALUES(floor_name), room_name = VALUES(room_name), rack_name = VALUES(rack_name), tags = VALUES(tags), source_row_hash = VALUES(source_row_hash)
mapper.select: SELECT id, rule_no AS ruleNo, shelf_id AS shelfId, region_id AS regionId, region_name AS regionName, floor_id AS floorId, floor_name AS floorName, room_id AS roomId, room_name AS roomName, rack_name AS rackName, tags, source_row_hash AS sourceRowHash, official_permission_level AS officialPermissionLevel, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM room_mapping_room WHERE room_id = #{roomId}

where.if: AND ( room_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR room_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR IFNULL(tags, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR IFNULL(region_name, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR IFNULL(floor_name, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT id, rule_no AS ruleNo, shelf_id AS shelfId, region_id AS regionId, region_name AS regionName, floor_id AS floorId, floor_name AS floorName, room_id AS roomId, room_name AS roomName, rack_name AS rackName, tags, source_row_hash AS sourceRowHash, official_permission_level AS officialPermissionLevel, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM room_mapping_room
ORDER BY IFNULL(rule_no, 99999999), room_id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT MAX(official_permission_level) FROM room_mapping_room WHERE official_permission_level IS NOT NULL
SELECT MAX(official_permission_level) FROM room_mapping_room WHERE official_permission_level IS NOT NULL AND official_permission_level < #{level}
SELECT DISTINCT region_name FROM room_mapping_room WHERE region_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(region_name) != '' ORDER BY region_name
